title: koeleria glauca subsp. intermedia
intro: Koeleria glauca subsp. intermedia, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Koeleria glauca subsp. intermedia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Koeleria glauca subsp. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
